creator: val@packett.cool
text:
Created attachment 191828
gnome-latex.patch

gtksourceview4 port is similar to gtksourceview3. (And it still uses GTK3, despite the name.)

tepl4 is https://wiki.gnome.org/Projects/Tepl for gtksourceview4. (There is an earlier version for gtksourceview3, it needs to be versioned like gtksourceview.)
